name: dcf-pdf-form-app
description: Modern React and Express application for filling the DCF PDF template.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/backend && npm run typecheck -w apps/frontend
